## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

> Security note: do not report unpatched vulnerabilities or sensitive data exposure in a public issue. Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting instead. Do not attach real resume data, API keys, tokens, or other secrets.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What should have happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126, Safari 17 |
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24 |
| Device | e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung S24 |
| Language selected | e.g. Arabic, French, English |
| Template selected | e.g. Modern, Classic |

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (console errors, network tab, etc.).
